_comment: PRICE APPROVALS. This is a reference copy. The price applier (scripts/apply-approved-product-updates.mjs, job: apply-approved-price-updates) reads reports/cutco-audit/approved-updates.json — copy reports/cutco-audit/approved-updates.example.json there and fill in ONLY prices Luke personally verified on cutco.com. sku must match assets/explorer.js IMG. newPriceCents = full retail in cents ($197.00 -> 19700). Dry-run unless --apply; backs up explorer.js first; never fetches or guesses.
